contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: truesight.me By Partner + By Inventory Type interactivity polish
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/64
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/65
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse-inventory/pull/10
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse-inventory/pull/11
  
  Details:
  truesight.me By Partner + By Inventory Type interactivity polish
  
  Two PRs against truesight_me_beta after the earlier session-wrap. Both improve the
  sell-through dashboard's expandable-row UX on https://truesight.me.
  
  1. TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta#64 — By Partner fixes:
     - Expand-click was triple-broken: listener attached to the FIRST table
       (By Inventory Type, wrong target), data-pid lookup vulnerable to dupes,
       and a duplicate container.innerHTML wiped the listener entirely. Now
       targets #partner-table, uses nextElementSibling to find the partner's
       own detail row, removes the redundant innerHTML assignment.
     - partner-row border moved from border-bottom to border-top so an
       expanded detail visually anchors to its parent partner instead of
       floating into the next row.
     - First td of partner-row + inner-table first td inside partner-detail
       given explicit text-align:left + 12px horizontal padding for visual
       consistency.
  
  2. TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta#65 — By Inventory Type expandable:
     - <th>Type</th> given explicit text-align:left so the header sits flush
       with the type-name cells (was inheriting UA default th{center}).
     - Each type-row gets a ▸ arrow + cursor:pointer + border-top, mirroring
       the By Partner pattern.
     - Hidden type-detail row inserted below each type-row, listing the
       partners whose items match that inventory_type, with per-partner
       inventory + sales-monthly sums and SKU list.
     - Event delegation on #type-table uses nextElementSibling (same robust
       pattern as the By Partner table).
  
  Plus partners-velocity.json + partners-inventory.json + store-inventory.json
  refreshed twice during this cluster — PRs agroverse-inventory#10 and #11.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
